title: SAFRI Grey Barrier Mat Heavy Duty Indoor Outdoor Dirt Trapper Door Mat Non-Slip Entrance Rug Shoes Scraper Absorbent Carpet (40cm_x_60cm)
features: NON-SLIP---Fitted With a Slip Resistant Rubber Backing, The Dirt Stopper Carpet Is Kept Firmly In Place While In Use, Ensuring Maximum Safety And Protection To Your Floor.
HIGHLY ABSORBENT---Soft Absorbent 100% Polypropylene Piles, Keeping Moisture, Dirt, Mud And Dampness From Your Home.
EASY TO CLEAN---It can be scrubbed, machine washed, power hosed or scrubbed for easy cleaning.

IDEAL FOR YOUR HOME---suitable for both indoor & outdoor use, thanks to its all-weather and waterproof design use it as a front door mat in your hallway, kitchen rug in front of the sink, as a pet mat, as doormats inside, as door mat indoor, or in simply place it in your patio, garage, balcony. The ideal solution for commercial entrances including offices, Home, Hallways, Super Stores Factory Etc.
AVAILABLE COLOUR---Grey with black lines as shown in images.
